info.title: Qnova Backend API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Qnova Backend services accessible via API Key and JWT authentication.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Core analytics endpoints (A1-A9): overview dashboard, agent scorecard, hierarchy comparison, block analytics, leaderboard, score trends, communication analytics, AI vs human calibration, and score consistency.

tags.name: AIAnalytics
tags.description: AI-powered analytics endpoints (B1-B4): agent AI profile with competency scores, improvement tracking over time, team/org insight reports, and AI summary reports.

tags.name: Monitoring
tags.description: Quality and question monitoring endpoints: quality monitor with time-bucketed pass rates, question monitor with per-entity breakdowns, analysis chart with configurable views, and evaluation overview.

tags.name: Benchmark
tags.description: Benchmark matrix: questions grouped by blocks with pass rates across entities (agents, teams, service partners, projects, campaigns).

tags.name: EvaluationResults
tags.description: Paginated evaluation results listing with sorting, filtering, and entity name resolution.

tags.name: ManagementReport
tags.description: Management reporting endpoints: aggregated KPIs with trends, team breakdowns, and AI-generated status reports (Lagebericht).

tags.name: Chatbot
tags.description: AI chatbot endpoints for conversational data exploration. Supports multi-turn conversations with tool-calling for analytics queries.

tags.name: StorageConnections
tags.description: Storage connection management (external S3, SFTP, Azure, GCS, etc.)

tags.name: FileManager
tags.description: File browsing, upload, download, and management

get.summary: Overview dashboard with summary KPIs, performance distribution, and score distribution
Agent scorecard with summary stats, block breakdown, and score trend
Hierarchy comparison across projects, service partners, teams, or campaigns

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Entity dimension to group results by

get.summary: Block analytics with per-block and per-question stats for a questionnaire
Agent leaderboard ranked by score, evaluations, or improvement rate

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of agents to return (1-100, default: 20)

get.summary: Score trends over time with configurable interval
Communication analytics for an agent including speaking stats, peer averages, and trends
AI vs human calibration analysis with overall, per-agent, and per-block score gaps
Score consistency analysis for an agent with peer comparison and recent scores
Agent AI profile with competency scores, call center metrics, strengths, weaknesses, and coaching priorities

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of evaluations to analyze (1-100, default: 50)

get.summary: Improvement tracking with competency dimension trends over time
Team/org insight report with competency radar data grouped by entity

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Entity dimension to group insights by

get.summary: AI summary report with org-wide competency profile, call center metrics, and agent highlights
Quality monitor with all questions grouped by blocks and time-bucketed pass rates
Question monitor with per-question pass rates across all entity dimensions
Analysis chart with time-series pass rates grouped by entity or block
Evaluation overview with summary cards and per-questionnaire block/question breakdown
Benchmark matrix with questions grouped by blocks and pass rates per entity
Paginated evaluation results with sorting, filtering, and entity name resolution
Management report with aggregated KPIs, trends, sentiment, NPS, team breakdown, and recent evaluations

post.summary: Generate AI-powered status report (Lagebericht) from dashboard data

502.description: AI service unavailable or returned invalid response

503.description: AI report generation not configured (missing OPENAI_API_KEY)

get.summary: List chatbot conversations for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of conversations to return (1-100, default: 50)

get.summary: Get a specific conversation with all messages

post.summary: Send a message to the AI chatbot and get a response

message.description: User message to send to the AI assistant

200.description: AI response with optional tool calls

externalId.description: Optional external reference ID from your system

email.description: Agent email (optional, unique per tenant if provided)

teamId.description: Team ID to assign the agent to (UUID)

get.summary: List agents with pagination and filters

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: Filter by exact external reference ID

get.summary: Get agent by ID

externalId.description: External reference ID (set to null to remove)

email.description: Agent email (set to null to remove)

teamId.description: New team ID (UUID) — if different from current team, automatically closes old membership and creates new one

get.summary: Download agent import XLSX template

200.description: XLSX template file for agent import

post.summary: Upload and validate an agent import file

file.description: XLSX file containing agents to import

invalidResults.description: Rows that failed validation with error details

summary.description: Summary counts of valid and invalid rows

post.summary: Confirm and create agents from validated import data

get.summary: List campaigns with pagination and filters
Get campaign by ID
Get agents relevant to a campaign

200.description: List of agents associated with the campaign

get.summary: List projects with pagination and filters
Get project by ID
List teams with pagination and filters
Get team by ID

anonymizePII.description: Whether to anonymize personally identifiable information

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain data

autoPurgeEnabled.description: Whether automatic data purge is enabled

get.summary: List service partners with pagination and filters
Get service partner by ID

anonymizePII.description: Whether to anonymize personally identifiable information

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain data

autoPurgeEnabled.description: Whether automatic data purge is enabled

failedItems.description: Items that failed to create processing runs

get.summary: List processing jobs
Get a processing job by ID

post.summary: Retry failed runs in a processing job

get.summary: List processing runs

200.description: List of processing runs with status counts

get.summary: Get full analysis for a processing run

post.summary: Submit an evaluation for a processing run

patch.summary: Update speaker labels for a processing run

Get an evaluation by ID

patch.summary: Toggle analytics exclusion for an evaluation

post.summary: Add a comment to a processing run

get.summary: List comments for a processing run
List audit logs
Get audit log statistics
Get an audit log by ID
Export audit logs

Get lookup statistics
List lookup tags

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by scope. Accepts comma-separated values. Valid values: question, file, campaign, servicePartner, agent, team, project

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type. Accepts comma-separated values. Valid values: string, number, boolean, date

get.summary: Get a lookup tag by ID
Get options for a lookup tag
Get lookups assigned to a resource

patch.summary: Sync lookup assignments for a resource

get.summary: Get assignments for a lookup tag
Get available batch filename patterns

post.summary: Parse batch filenames using a pattern

get.summary: Get all available answer types
get.description: Returns the list of all supported answer types with their descriptions, examples, and settings requirements. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

data.label: Boolean (Yes/No)
data.example: Did the agent greet the customer?

data.label: Rating Scale
data.description: Numeric rating scale with min/max values

data.label: Numeric Input
data.example: How many times did the agent say "thank you"?

data.label: Single Selection
data.description: Choose one option from a list

data.label: Multiple Selection
data.description: Choose multiple options from a list

data.label: Text Input
data.description: Free text input with optional constraints

data.label: Date Input
data.description: Date selection with optional range constraints

get.summary: List question templates
get.description: List all question templates with filtering, searching, and pagination. Supports filtering by type and status.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Text search across label, code, and helpText fields

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of answer types to filter by (e.g., 'boolean,rating,numeric,singleSelect,multiSelect,text,date')

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by deletion status. 'active' = not deleted, 'inactive' = deleted, 'all' = both.

post.description: Create a new question template. The code will be uppercased and must be unique per tenant. Settings must match the specified question type (e.g., rating requires scaleMin/scaleMax, singleSelect/multiSelect require options array).

example.label: Did the agent greet the customer?
example.helpText: Check if the agent used a proper greeting at the start of the call

get.summary: Get a question template by ID
get.description: Retrieve a single question template by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Update an existing question template. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated. If code is provided, it will be uppercased and checked for uniqueness. If both type and settings are provided, settings must match the type.

example.label: Did the agent greet the customer properly?
example.helpText: Updated help text for greeting check

delete.description: Soft-delete a question template. The template will be marked as deleted but not removed from the database.

get.summary: List questionnaires
get.description: List all questionnaires (latest versions only) with optional filtering by name and pagination. Groups questionnaires by questionnaireKey and returns only the most recent version of each.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by questionnaire name (partial match, case-insensitive)

post.description: Create a new questionnaire (version 1). The questionnaire is assigned a unique questionnaireKey and starts at version 1. Blocks are prepared with auto-calculated maxScore from question weights, and questions receive metadata with creation timestamps.

blocks.name: Greeting & Opening
blocks.tooltip: Evaluate the agent's greeting and call opening

questions.label: Did the agent greet the customer?

get.summary: Get a questionnaire by ID
get.description: Retrieve a single questionnaire by its unique identifier. Returns the specific version referenced by the ID.

patch.description: Update a questionnaire by creating a new version. The original version is preserved. The new version inherits the same questionnaireKey with an incremented version number. All campaigns referencing old versions are automatically updated to point to the new version.

blocks.name: Greeting & Opening
blocks.tooltip: Evaluate the agent's greeting and call opening

questions.label: Did the agent greet the customer properly?

delete.description: Soft-delete all versions of a questionnaire. All versions sharing the same questionnaireKey are marked as deleted.

get.summary: Get all versions of a questionnaire
get.description: Retrieve all versions of a questionnaire, sorted by version number descending (newest first). Looks up the questionnaire by ID, then fetches all versions sharing the same questionnaireKey.

post.description: Restore a previous version of a questionnaire by creating a new version with the content from the specified old version. The restored version gets a new incremented version number and its metaData.restoredFrom field tracks the source version. All campaigns referencing old versions are automatically updated to point to the restored version.

get.summary: List block templates
get.description: List all block templates with optional filtering by search term and status, with pagination and sorting.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Text search across name and tooltip fields

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by deletion status. 'active' = not deleted, 'inactive' = deleted, 'all' = both.

post.description: Create a new block template with a name and tooltip.

example.name: Greeting & Opening
example.tooltip: Evaluate the agent's greeting and call opening procedures

get.summary: Get a block template by ID
get.description: Retrieve a single block template by its unique identifier.

patch.description: Update an existing block template. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Soft-delete a block template. The template will be marked as deleted but not removed from the database.

get.summary: Get storage statistics
get.description: Returns aggregate storage statistics including total size, total file count, and breakdowns by file category (audio, video, document, image, archive, other).

post.summary: Test a new connection before saving
post.description: Tests connectivity to an external storage provider using the provided credentials without persisting the connection. Protected with rate limiting to prevent credential testing abuse.

get.summary: List storage connections
get.description: Returns a paginated list of storage connections for the authenticated user's organization. Supports filtering by connection type and active status.

post.description: Creates a new external storage connection. Credentials are encrypted at rest. When autoSync is enabled, syncIntervalMinutes is required. When namingConventionPattern is 'custom', customPattern is required.

get.summary: Get a storage connection by ID
get.description: Retrieves a single storage connection by its ID. Credentials are masked in the response.

patch.description: Partially updates an existing storage connection. All fields are optional. Credentials are re-encrypted if provided.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a storage connection and removes any pending sync jobs from the queue.

post.description: Tests connectivity for an already-saved storage connection using its stored (encrypted) credentials.
Enqueues a sync job for the specified storage connection. Optionally filter by source path or request a full sync (ignoring last-sync checkpoint).

jobId.description: BullMQ job ID for the queued sync job

get.summary: Get sync status for a connection
get.description: Returns the current sync status, last sync information, and next scheduled sync time for a storage connection.

get.summary: List sync logs
get.description: Returns a paginated list of storage sync logs. Supports filtering by storage connection, status, and date range.

get.summary: Get a sync log by ID
get.description: Retrieves a single sync log entry including its file processing details.

get.summary: Get file processing details for a sync log
get.description: Returns the array of individual file processing results for a specific sync log entry.

get.summary: Search files
get.description: Full-text search across file names within the authenticated user's organization. Supports filtering by file category and resource associations.

get.summary: Get folder tree structure
get.description: Returns the entire folder/file tree structure for the authenticated user's organization.

post.description: Uploads a single file to storage. The file is stored in S3 and a FileDocument record is created. Supports optional association with projects, service partners, teams, agents, and campaigns.

servicePartnerId.description: Associate file with a service partner

folderPath.description: Target folder path (e.g. 'reports/2024'). Defaults to root.

post.description: Creates a new folder (virtual prefix) in storage. Folder name must match pattern [a-zA-Z0-9-_. ]+.

path.description: Full path of the created folder

delete.description: Deletes a folder and all its contents (files and sub-folders) permanently.

get.summary: Browse contents at a path
get.description: Lists folders and files at the specified path (or root if omitted). Returns folders first, then paginated files. Supports filtering by resource associations and file category.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Folder path to browse. Empty or '/' for root.

get.summary: Get file details by ID
get.description: Retrieves full details of a single file document including object storage information and ingest metadata.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a file from both S3 storage and the database.

get.summary: Get a pre-signed download URL
get.description: Generates a temporary pre-signed S3 URL for downloading the specified file.

expiresIn.description: Number of seconds until the URL expires

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for organization-level access (bypasses RBAC)

avgScore.description: Average total score (rounded to 2 decimal places)

performanceDistribution.description: Map of performance level (e.g., 'excellent', 'good', 'needs_improvement') to count

avgTotalTalkTime.description: Average total talk time in seconds

aiTendsHigher.description: Number of agents where AI scores higher

humanTendsHigher.description: Number of agents where human scores higher

competencyProfile.description: Map of competency dimension name to average score

sentimentBreakdown.description: Sentiment distribution (positive, neutral, negative counts) plus avgScore

performanceBreakdown.description: Map of performance level to count

overallImprovement.description: Score change from first to last period (null if fewer than 2 data points)

dimensions.description: Map of competency dimension to average score

avgDimensions.description: Map of competency dimension to average score

competencyProfile.description: Map of competency dimension to org-wide average score

periods.description: Map of period key to pass rate data

overall.description: Overall (footer) row: map of period key to aggregate pass rate data

count.description: Total question evaluations in this period

delta.description: Change from previous period (null if first)

data.description: Map of period key to pass rate data

groups.description: List of entities (columns) in the benchmark matrix

results.description: Map of group ID to pass rate data

dashboard.description: Dashboard data object (typically the output from GET /analytics/management-report)

from.description: Start date for the report period

to.description: End date for the report period

thresholds.description: Custom threshold values for status assignment. All fields optional; defaults are used for unspecified values.

sentimentSummary.description: 1-2 sentences on sentiment distribution and trend

topicsSummary.description: 1-2 sentences on most important topics and call reasons

mainReasons.description: 2-3 sentences describing concrete reasons customers are contacting

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the report was generated

cached.description: Whether the response was served from cache

lastMessage.description: First 100 characters of the last message

name.description: Tool function name that was called

toolCalls.description: List of analytics tools called during response generation

code.description: Unique code for the question template (uppercase, max 50 chars)

label.description: Display label for the question (max 500 chars)

helpText.description: Help text for the question (max 1000 chars)

prompt.description: AI prompt for the question (max 5000 chars)

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID) for this specific version

questionnaireKey.description: Stable UUID that groups all versions of the same questionnaire

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the currently active version

QuestionnaireBlock.description: A block within a questionnaire containing questions

blockId.description: Reference to the block template ID

tooltip.description: Tooltip text for the block (max 500 chars)

maxScore.description: Maximum possible score for the block (auto-calculated from question weights)

QuestionnaireQuestion.description: An embedded question within a questionnaire block

questionId.description: Reference to the question template ID

label.description: Display label for the question (max 500 chars)

isKnockout.description: Whether this is a knockout question

StorageConnection.description: An external storage connection. Credentials are masked in responses.

syncIntervalMinutes.description: Sync interval in minutes (1 to 10080 = 7 days)

customPattern.description: Custom naming pattern string. Required when namingConventionPattern is 'custom'.

lastSyncAt.description: Timestamp of the last sync operation

lastSyncStatus.description: Result of the last sync operation

syncErrorMessage.description: Error message from the last failed sync

FileDocument.description: A file stored in Qnova storage with full metadata including object storage details

callDateTime.description: Timestamp of the original call (parsed from metadata)

storageConnectionId.description: ID of the storage connection this file was synced from

parsedMetadata.description: Metadata extracted from filename/path using the naming convention pattern

QuestionnaireMetaData.description: Questionnaire metadata, extends MetaData with restoredFrom field

restoredFrom.description: Version number this questionnaire was restored from, if applicable

AnswerType.description: The type of answer expected for a question

BooleanSettings.description: Settings for boolean question type (no additional settings required)

scaleMin.description: Minimum value on the rating scale

scaleMax.description: Maximum value on the rating scale

settingsRequired.description: Whether settings configuration is required for this type

settingsExample.description: Example settings object for this type (only present when settingsRequired is true or when optional settings exist)

code.description: Unique code for the question template (will be uppercased)

settings.description: Type-specific settings. Required for rating, singleSelect, multiSelect types. See individual settings schemas.

code.description: Unique code for the question template (will be uppercased)

settings.description: Type-specific settings. Must match the question type if both type and settings are provided.

UpdateQuestionTemplateBody.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields will be updated.

questionId.description: ID of the question this condition depends on
Reference to the question template ID

settings.description: Type-specific settings. Must match question type.

isKnockout.description: Whether this is a knockout question

blockId.description: Reference to the block template ID

maxScore.description: Maximum possible score (auto-calculated if not provided)

UpdateQuestionnaireBody.description: All fields are optional. Updating creates a new version.

UpdateBlockTemplateBody.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields will be updated.

NamingPattern.description: Naming convention pattern for file organization during sync

FileStatus.description: Processing status of a file document

sourceIp.description: IP address of the upload source

count.description: Number of files in this category

size.description: Total size in bytes for this category

byCategory.description: File counts and sizes grouped by category

credentials.description: Key-value credentials specific to the connection type (e.g. host, username, password, bucket, accessKey, secretKey, region)

autoSync.description: Enable automatic periodic sync. Requires syncIntervalMinutes when true.

syncIntervalMinutes.description: Auto-sync interval in minutes (1 min to 7 days). Required when autoSync is true.

customPattern.description: Custom naming pattern. Required when namingConventionPattern is 'custom'.

credentials.description: Key-value credentials specific to the connection type
Key-value credentials specific to the connection type

sourcePath.description: Optional source path to sync from (sub-directory on the remote)

fullSync.description: When true, ignores last-sync checkpoint and re-syncs all files

lastSyncStatus.description: Status of last sync (success, failed, in_progress)

nextSyncDue.description: Calculated next sync time based on lastSyncAt + syncIntervalMinutes

ProcessedFile.description: Individual file processing result within a sync log

s3Key.description: S3 object key where the file was stored

processedAt.description: Timestamp when this file was processed

StorageSyncLog.description: A record of a sync operation between an external connection and Qnova storage

filesProcessed.description: Excluded from list and detail responses. Only available via the GET /storage/storage-sync-logs/{id}/files sub-endpoint.

errorMessage.description: Top-level error message if the entire sync failed

BrowseFileDocument.description: A file document returned in browse responses (excludes objectStorage/ingest, includes URLs)

FolderItem.description: A virtual folder in the file manager

TreeNode.description: A node in the folder/file tree structure (recursive)

id.description: File document ID. Present only when type is 'file'.

metadata.description: File metadata. Present only when type is 'file'.

children.description: Child nodes. Present only when type is 'folder'.

path.description: Parent folder path. Empty or omitted for root.

name.description: Folder name (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, spaces)

MultiProjectIdParam.name: projectId
MultiProjectIdParam.description: Filter by project ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs (e.g., 'id1,id2,id3').

MultiServicePartnerIdParam.name: servicePartnerId
MultiServicePartnerIdParam.description: Filter by service partner ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs.

MultiTeamIdParam.name: teamId
MultiTeamIdParam.description: Filter by team ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs.

MultiCampaignIdParam.name: campaignId
MultiCampaignIdParam.description: Filter by campaign ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs.

MultiQuestionnaireIdParam.name: questionnaireId
MultiQuestionnaireIdParam.description: Filter by questionnaire ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs.

MultiAgentIdParam.name: agentId
MultiAgentIdParam.description: Filter by agent ID(s). Supports comma-separated values for multiple IDs.

BadRequest.description: Bad Request - Validation error or invalid input

example.message: Authentication required with valid tenant information

NotFound.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist
